title: Apple Reports Record Q4 Revenue Driven by iPhone 17 Sales
description: Apple Inc. reported record fourth-quarter revenue of $94.9 billion, up 6% year over year, driven by strong iPhone 16 sales and services growth.

title: Apple Vision Pro 2 Launch Expected in Early 2026
description: Sources close to Apple suggest the company is preparing to launch Vision Pro 2 with improved displays and reduced weight in Q1 2026.

title: Apple Stock Rises 3% on Strong iPhone Demand Data
description: Apple shares climbed 3% in early trading following reports of stronger-than-expected iPhone 16 Pro demand in China.

title: Apple Expands Manufacturing in India with New Chennai Facility
description: Apple announced plans to open a new manufacturing facility in Chennai, India, expanding its supply chain diversification strategy.

title: Apple Services Revenue Hits All-Time High of $25 Billion
description: Apple's services segment, including App Store and Apple Music, generated record revenue of $25 billion in Q4 2025.

title: Apple Pay Later Reaches 50 Million Active Users
description: Apple's buy-now-pay-later service has reached 50 million active users in the US, gaining market share from Affirm and Klarna.

title: Apple M4 Max Chip Benchmarks Show 40% Performance Gain
description: Early benchmarks of Apple's M4 Max chip reveal a 40% improvement in multi-core performance over M3 Max.

title: Google Cloud Revenue Surges 35% as AI Adoption Accelerates
description: Alphabet's Google Cloud division reported a 35% revenue increase driven by enterprise AI workloads and Gemini API adoption.

title: Samsung Announces Galaxy S25 with Advanced AI Features
description: Samsung unveiled the Galaxy S25 series featuring on-device AI capabilities, intensifying competition with Apple's iPhone lineup.

title: YouTube Premium Subscribers Hit 100 Million Milestone
description: YouTube announced that its Premium subscription service has surpassed 100 million subscribers globally, boosting Alphabet's services revenue.

title: Fed Signals Potential Rate Cut in December Meeting
description: Federal Reserve officials indicated openness to a December rate cut if inflation continues to moderate, boosting tech stocks.

title: Microsoft Azure Reports 29% Growth Amid AI Competition
description: Microsoft's Azure cloud platform reported 29% revenue growth, maintaining pressure on Google Cloud in the enterprise market.

title: Qualcomm Unveils Snapdragon 8 Elite Chip for Premium Smartphones
description: Qualcomm announced its Snapdragon 8 Elite processor, challenging Apple's A18 Pro chip in performance benchmarks.

title: Google DeepMind Achieves Breakthrough in Protein Structure Prediction
description: DeepMind researchers announced significant improvements in AlphaFold 3, enabling faster drug discovery applications.

title: US GDP Growth Exceeds Expectations at 3.1% in Q3
description: The US economy grew at an annualized rate of 3.1% in Q3 2025, beating economist expectations and supporting equity markets.

title: Waymo Expands Autonomous Taxi Service to Miami and Atlanta
description: Alphabet's Waymo announced expansion of its robotaxi service to Miami and Atlanta, accelerating its autonomous vehicle deployment.

title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5 with Enhanced Reasoning Capabilities
description: OpenAI released GPT-5 with significant improvements in reasoning and multimodal understanding, intensifying AI competition with Google.

title: S&P 500 Reaches New All-Time High on Strong Earnings
description: The S&P 500 index hit a new record high, driven by better-than-expected earnings from technology and financial sectors.

title: Google Workspace Adds AI-Powered Meeting Summaries
description: Google announced new AI features for Workspace including automatic meeting summaries and action item extraction.

title: TSMC Reports Strong Demand for 3nm Chips from Apple
description: Taiwan Semiconductor reported record demand for its 3nm process, with Apple accounting for majority of orders.

title: Alphabet Board Approves $50 Billion Stock Buyback Program
description: Alphabet's board of directors approved a new $50 billion share repurchase program, signaling confidence in future growth.

title: Oil Prices Drop 5% on Middle East Ceasefire Hopes
description: Crude oil prices fell 5% following reports of potential ceasefire negotiations in the Middle East, easing supply concerns.

title: Apple Watch Series 10 Leads Global Smartwatch Market
description: Apple Watch Series 10 captured 55% of global smartwatch shipments in Q3 2025, extending Apple's market dominance.

title: Google Search Maintains 91% Market Share Despite AI Competition
description: Despite increased competition from AI chatbots, Google Search maintained a 91% market share in global search queries.

title: Apple Announces Sustainability Goals: Carbon Neutral by 2030
description: Apple reaffirmed its commitment to becoming carbon neutral across its entire supply chain by 2030.

title: Meta AI Assistant Reaches 500 Million Monthly Users
description: Meta reported that its AI assistant has reached 500 million monthly active users, competing directly with Google's Gemini.

title: Treasury Yields Fall as Markets Price in Rate Cuts
description: 10-year Treasury yields dropped to 4.1% as bond markets increased bets on Federal Reserve rate cuts in 2026.

title: Apple Intelligence Features Roll Out Globally
description: Apple began global rollout of Apple Intelligence features, including enhanced Siri capabilities and on-device AI processing.

title: Google Pixel 9 Pro Achieves Record Sales in First Month
description: Google's Pixel 9 Pro smartphone achieved record first-month sales, with demand exceeding company expectations.

title: Intel Announces Layoffs as Chip Competition Intensifies
description: Intel announced 15000 job cuts as the company faces increased competition from Apple Silicon and AMD processors.
